---
name: Manage Existing Article
about: Archive, exclude, or restore an article that is already in the knowledge system
title: "[Manage Article] "
labels: knowledge-management
assignees: ""
---

Use this issue for an article that already exists in the knowledge system.

Comment one of these commands after creating the issue:

```text
/archive ARTICLE_ID reason
/exclude ARTICLE_ID reason
/restore ARTICLE_ID reason
```
